steps.title: Use hemisphere volume
steps.content:
A hemisphere is half of a sphere, so its volume is
$$V=\frac{1}{2}(\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3)=\frac{2}{3}\pi r^3$$

steps.title: Estimate the volume
steps.content:
Finish the calculation and choose the closest listed value.
$$\frac{2}{3}\pi(493{,}039)\sim 1{,}032{,}600$$
The answer is D.
